define.description: 想法模糊、需要方案对比、收敛到规格

design.description: 创作设计定稿：交互、视觉、排版、剧本、导演

build.description: 拆分任务、增量生成产物

verify.description: 质量把关、Bug 调查、审查

maintain.description: 可观测性、上下文管理、学习记录、目标追踪

deck.note: 必须先 design 定稿，再 writing，最后 layout，不可并行

skill_descriptions.design-workflow-design: 需要在 plan/build 前定稿创作设计阶段
skill_descriptions.design-experience-interaction: 需要设计用户路径、页面结构、状态或信息架构
skill_descriptions.design-visual-direction: 需要确定视觉方向、风格、层级或组件视觉规则
skill_descriptions.design-content-script: 需要先定故事线、剧本骨架、段落或页级消息线
skill_descriptions.design-content-direction: 需要设计页序推进、演讲节奏或情绪推进
skill_descriptions.design-content-layout: 需要先定版式系统、构图、页面层级或导出规格
skill_descriptions.define-cognitive-brainstorm: 想法模糊、开放性问题、需要方案对比
skill_descriptions.define-workflow-spec: refine 完成后需要编写正式 spec
skill_descriptions.build-workflow-plan: spec 已批准需要拆成可执行任务
skill_descriptions.build-workflow-execute: plan 已批准需要开始实现或生成交付物
skill_descriptions.build-cognitive-context: 上下文混乱或输出质量下降
skill_descriptions.build-cognitive-source-driven: 使用不熟悉的 API/框架
skill_descriptions.build-cognitive-execution-engine: build-workflow-plan 完成后需要选择执行模式并写代码
skill_descriptions.build-cognitive-decision-record: 面临技术选型或架构决策
skill_descriptions.build-infrastructure-git: 需要提交代码、创建分支或管理变更
skill_descriptions.build-frontend-ui-engineering: 构建/修改 UI 组件
skill_descriptions.build-frontend-browser-testing: 前端变更需要运行时验证或 UI bug 调查
skill_descriptions.build-backend-api-design: 设计 API/接口/数据合约
skill_descriptions.build-backend-database: 设计 schema/写迁移/优化查询
skill_descriptions.build-backend-service-patterns: 需要设计后端服务架构或跨服务通信
skill_descriptions.build-content-writing: artifact_type 为 document/article/deck，或需要内容创作
skill_descriptions.build-content-layout: artifact_type 为 document/deck/visual，或需要版式设计
skill_descriptions.verify-workflow-spec-compliance: 需要验证实现是否完整覆盖 spec 和验收标准
skill_descriptions.verify-quality-code-quality: 需要按五轴标准评估实现质量
skill_descriptions.verify-workflow-debug: 遇到 bug/测试失败/意外行为（MUST）
skill_descriptions.verify-frontend-accessibility: 构建 UI 组件/表单/导航
skill_descriptions.verify-quality-integration-testing: 需要在单元测试之上验证跨组件/跨服务的正确性
skill_descriptions.verify-quality-performance: 性能不达标或上线前审查
skill_descriptions.verify-quality-security: 涉及用户输入/认证/数据存储
skill_descriptions.verify-team-code-review-standards: 需要审查代码或定义审查基准
skill_descriptions.verify-content-review: artifact_type 为 document/article/deck，或需要内容质量审查
skill_descriptions.verify-visual-review: artifact_type 为 visual，或需要检查视觉质量
skill_descriptions.verify-workflow-receiving-review: 收到代码审查反馈需要评估和实施
skill_descriptions.verify-quality-simplify: 代码变得复杂/重复/过度抽象
skill_descriptions.ship-workflow-ship: 审查通过后上线或交付
skill_descriptions.ship-infrastructure-ci-cd: 设置/修改 CI/CD 管道
skill_descriptions.ship-artifact-export: artifact_type 为非 software，需要导出最终文件
skill_descriptions.ship-workflow-canary: 代码已部署需要持续验证
skill_descriptions.ship-workflow-land: PR 合并到主分支并验证部署
skill_descriptions.ship-workflow-doc-sync: 代码已合并需要同步更新项目文档
skill_descriptions.maintain-infrastructure-observability: 需要监控生产、调查线上问题或配置告警
skill_descriptions.maintain-team-deprecation-migration: 需要移除、替换或迁移已有功能/API
skill_descriptions.maintain-workflow-using-unified: session 启动时建立主动技能发现机制
skill_descriptions.maintain-workflow-context-save: 保存工作上下文供后续恢复
skill_descriptions.maintain-workflow-context-restore: 新 session 继续之前的工作
skill_descriptions.maintain-workflow-learn: 发现项目模式/踩坑/偏好需要持久化
skill_descriptions.reflect-team-retro: 功能完成/里程碑达成/事故处理后复盘
skill_descriptions.reflect-team-documentation: 记录架构决策或维护项目知识
skill_descriptions.maintain-workflow-goal: 创建、追踪、暂停或完成跨 session 的持久化目标
